title: Living in Boulder Vlog 3 - 13 - 2017: 2.5 kilometer diameters in background

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog (nearly 2am) about working on his website all day, including adding photos. He mentions a planned chore of photographing his van to sell it and making a video commercial for it, notes that five interested buyers lack recent photos, and describes a personal mental exercise he calls 'area circles imagination' where he incrementally expands a radius around himself each day (500m, 1000m, 2500m, etc.) as a spatial/imaginative practice he's been developing for his website.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited about how fast it's coming together and finds it fun with his current computer
doesn't look forward to it but accepts it as a necessary chore
enthusiastic about the practice, incrementing the radius daily as a personal space/imagination exercise

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder, V-Log for March 13th, 2017.
Today, I can't remember what time I got up.
It was like 10 or something, or 9 or something.
But I was working on my website all day long, surface stuff.
Last couple days I was doing writing, but now I'm doing...
I was actually doing the website, like, adding pictures.
For some reason, I never added pictures.
I think it's because, yeah, I was working on my old computer,
And I was just kicking the shit out of my old computer.
Because my pages were too big, but...
Yeah, with this computer, we're zooming through, it's really fun.
But tomorrow's chore, I need to do stuff to sell my car.
So tomorrow's chore is going to be...
And I'm looking forward to it.
Taking a bunch of photos of my van.
Hopefully it's sunny, it was sunny today.
And then video, van and video.
Do, like, a commercial for my van.
Yeah, and that'll be my thing for selling the van.
Oh, yeah, and email back to people who are interested.
There are, like, five people interested,
But I didn't have modern photos.
And then also work on the website.
It's because it's coming so fast.
Oh, and right now, it's 2 o'clock in the morning.
I'm doing my area circles imagination.
I haven't even talked about that from my website yet.
And so I'm incrementing up two times each day.
Then I did my house, and then 1,000.
And then it's going to go up to five kilometers.
Two and a half kilometers across is like...
It's like a town or something.
I haven't been, like, listening to anything.
And, uh, yeah, not anything else going on.
Don't have anything else to say.
